data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for walk-in support (queue management). While there is evidence of customers entering a waitlist/queue flow, it does not confirm that the system effectively manages walk-ins or provides the necessary queue management features as required. The evidence does not detail how walk-ins are supported beyond their entry into a queue, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming effective management of walk-ins beyond queue entry.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify walk-in queue management functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the system provides features for managing walk-ins effectively.
